name: Lethal
description: When a unit makes an attack with an Attack Pool that has Lethal X, it can spend up to X Aim tokens during the Modify Attack Dice step. If it does, the Attack Pool gains Pierce 1 for each Aim token spent. The attacking unit may not reroll dice with any Aim tokens spent in this way.
official_rules_text: When a unit makes an attack with an Attack Pool that has Lethal X, it can spend up to X Aim tokens during the Modify Attack Dice step. If it does, the Attack Pool gains Pierce 1 for each Aim token spent. The attacking unit may not reroll dice with any Aim tokens spent in this way.
